title: lamium maculatum var. rubrum
intro: Lamium maculatum var. rubrum, also known as red-veined nettle-leaved deadnettle or red-veined deadnettle, is a flowering plant species in the mint family Lamiaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic qualities, which are derived from its essential oils and flavonoids. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation and pain, treating respiratory issues, and promoting digestive health, making it a valuable remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Lamium maculatum var. rubrum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used internally or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
